states.label: Idle
states.description: Gentle breathing pulse, subtle glow, presence dot lightly animated.

states.label: Listening
states.description: Input-focused state with brighter ring, slight scale emphasis, and suggestion chips reveal.

states.label: Searching the web
states.description: Radial scan sweep, orbiting dots, flowing particles, active glow.

states.label: Thinking
states.description: Connected nodes, routing lines, staged progress labels, synthesis motion.

states.label: Complete
states.description: Motion settles, green state stabilizes, soft completion flash.

assistant.title: Who's the one you're searching for?
assistant.helperCopy: Columbus searches mock job signals and stages recruiter-ready results.

transcript.text: Any specific tech stack or industry?
I found 20 roles and staged them in the artifact panel. Open a card to inspect fit, requirements, and apply paths.

emptyState.title: Your Columbus output appears here
emptyState.description: Run a role search to stage ranked jobs, fit summaries, requirements, and apply paths.

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
jobs.fitSummary: Strong fit for a remote frontend profile with early-career React experience.
jobs.roleBrief: Northstar Labs is hiring a frontend engineer to ship polished dashboards, artifacts, and collaboration flows across its student productivity suite. The team wants someone comfortable with React, component architecture, and product iteration.
requirements: Strong CSS and component systems fluency
Comfort with API integration and product QA
Portfolio or shipped work that shows interface judgment

companyInfo.whyItMatches: Strong fit for a remote frontend profile with early-career React experience.

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.fitSummary: Close match for frontend candidates who want remote product work with design exposure.
jobs.roleBrief: Orbit Commerce is looking for a frontend developer who can turn product specs into resilient, responsive interfaces. You will work closely with design and growth teams on merchant-facing workflows.
requirements: Comfort collaborating with design and PM teams
Strong sense for polished interaction detail

companyInfo.whyItMatches: Close match for frontend candidates who want remote product work with design exposure.

jobs.title: UI Engineer
jobs.fitSummary: Strong option for candidates open to hybrid work and UI-heavy dashboard products.
jobs.roleBrief: Beacon Cloud is building internal and customer-facing dashboards for cloud operations teams. The role favors engineers who care about interface clarity, accessibility, and design-detail execution.
requirements: Ability to collaborate across PM and design

companyInfo.whyItMatches: Good for UI-heavy frontend profiles with dashboard experience.

jobs.title: Machine Learning Intern
jobs.fitSummary: Excellent match for an ML intern profile with Python skills and limited formal experience.
jobs.roleBrief: Helio AI is seeking an intern to support data labeling pipelines, model evaluation, and lightweight product experimentation across an applied AI stack.
requirements: Comfort with notebooks and data cleaning

companyInfo.whyItMatches: Strong entry point for candidates exploring ML internships.

jobs.title: Product Engineer
jobs.fitSummary: Great fit for frontend engineers who like shipping across design, product, and engineering.
jobs.roleBrief: Stackline Studio wants a product engineer who can own UI delivery end-to-end, collaborate closely with design, and move quickly inside a lean team.
requirements: React or similar frontend framework experience
Ability to work across product ambiguity

companyInfo.whyItMatches: Strong choice for product-minded frontend profiles.

jobs.title: React Engineer
jobs.fitSummary: Very solid fit for candidates focused on modern React products in SaaS environments.
jobs.roleBrief: VantaFlow is scaling its customer-facing platform and needs a React engineer to improve core workflows, performance, and UI consistency.
requirements: Comfort improving performance and state management

companyInfo.whyItMatches: Matches React-heavy candidates seeking SaaS product work.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer
jobs.fitSummary: Good fit for backend-leaning software candidates who want API and data-model work.
jobs.roleBrief: Alto Systems is hiring a backend engineer to build service layers, APIs, and internal tools supporting logistics operations and customer integrations.
requirements: Familiarity with SQL and data models

companyInfo.whyItMatches: Relevant if the candidate wants backend-focused progression.

jobs.title: Data Analyst Intern
jobs.fitSummary: Useful match for data-oriented candidates who want internship exposure and analytics workflows.
jobs.roleBrief: Meridian Bio is seeking a data analyst intern to support reporting, dashboard maintenance, and exploratory analysis across internal product and operations teams.

companyInfo.whyItMatches: Supports early-career candidates with analytics interests.
